name: P3.1 代数（模不等式/部分分式/多项式除法）
subject: math
curriculum_points: • understand the definition of a radian, and use the relationship between radians and degrees
• use the formulae s = rθ and A = ½r²θ in solving problems concerning the arc length and sector area of a circle.

excerpts.text: • understand the definition of a radian, and use the relationship between radians and degrees
• use the formulae s = rθ and A = ½r²θ in solving problems concerning the arc length and sector area of a circle.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「P3.1 代数（模不等式/部分分式/多项式除法）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：• understand the definition of a radian, and use the relationship between radians and degrees…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：• use the formulae s = rθ and A = ½r²θ in solving problems concerning the arc le… 对理解「P3.1 代数（模不等式/部分分式/多项式除法）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
